pi_items.metadata_value: ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database
pi_items.verified_value: ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database
pi_items.source: CVPR 2009 conference paper, confirmed via Semantic Scholar, IEEE Xplore, and official image-net.org website
ImageNet 2009 CVPR paper by Deng, J., Dong, W., Socher, R., Li, L-J., Li, K., and Fei-Fei, L. Jia Deng is the first author.
ImageNet paper published at CVPR 2009 (IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, Miami, June 2009)
Official ImageNet website confirmed in multiple sources; current URL uses HTTPS (not HTTP)

pi_items.verified_value: Stanford Vision Lab (in collaboration with Princeton University)
pi_items.source: Official ImageNet attribution lists 'Stanford Vision Lab, Stanford University, Princeton University'. The 2009 paper lists authors from Department of Computer Science at Princeton University. Project moved to Stanford when Fei-Fei Li joined Stanford as assistant professor in 2009.

privileged_info_summary: The ImageNet dataset paper 'ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database' was authored by Jia Deng (lead author), Wei Dong, Richard Socher, Li-Jia Li, Kai Li, and Fei-Fei Li from the Department of Computer Science at Princeton University. The paper was published at CVPR 2009. The dataset and paper are publicly available at image-net.org. However, the dataset repository is officially attributed to 'Stanford Vision Lab' in collaboration with Princeton University (not 'Princeton Vision Lab' as claimed). The associated paper 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' by Krizhevsky, Sutskever, and Hinton was published in NIPS 2012.
